## 📊 Bug Category
- [ ] **Visual Glitch** — Animation looks wrong but logic is correct
- [ ] **Incorrect Logic** — Algorithm produces wrong result
- [ ] **Performance Issue** — Slow, laggy, or freezing
- [ ] **UI/UX Issue** — Controls don't work as expected
- [ ] **Other** — Describe below
